Author: James
Name: Housing NPC Pose
Punchline: Client-side housing NPC pose automation with visual Y offsets and nameplate hiding.
Description: v0.4.0 housing scene UI build. Redesigns the main window around a human-friendly actor dropdown, searchable pose browser, category filters, quick scene poses, and slider-based visual Y offset controls while keeping the stable client-side pose/Y/nameplate/auto-apply system unchanged. Lists visible housing NPC/object candidates, blocks known non-humanoid creature NPCs, saves local pose assignments plus optional visual Y offsets, reconciles known pose params against CSV emote/action metadata, and keeps discovery tools under Advanced. Client-side only: no packets, spawning, server-side movement, hooks, or effects on other clients.
